revealed_facts: Single Carfax flag for minor fender bender in 2021, repaired at non-certified body shop with aftermarket bumper cover
Quarter-sized dent with minor paint crack on rear passenger door from shopping cart impact, partially hidden by door handle shadow in photos

review.review_text: Seller was not upfront about a minor fender bender and a body dent, which only came to light through independent inspections. Answers regarding their own inspection report were also vague.
